settings.editor: 24/7 Emergency Service Available — Call (909) 600-4561
Full-service plumbing for every situation — from emergency response to routine maintenance, serving 32+ cities across the Inland Empire.

Plumbing emergencies don't wait for business hours. Regal Plumbing & Rooter provides 24/7 emergency response for burst pipes, sewage backups, major leaks, and gas line issues throughout the Inland Empire. Our technicians are equipped to handle the most critical situations quickly and professionally.

From kitchen sinks to main sewer lines, we clear all drain types using professional snaking and high-pressure hydrojetting. Inland Empire water is high in minerals that accelerate buildup — our thorough approach removes blockages completely and prevents rapid recurrence.

Camera inspection reveals exactly what's happening inside your sewer line before we recommend any repair. We offer trenchless pipe lining and pipe bursting methods that fix damaged sewer lines with minimal yard disruption — no unnecessary trenching.

Repair and replacement for all water heater types — traditional tank, tankless, and hybrid heat pump units. Inland Empire hard water shortens water heater life through scale buildup; we offer flush services and anode rod replacement to extend lifespan, plus full replacements when needed.

Electronic leak detection locates the exact position of pipe failures beneath your concrete slab without destructive guesswork. Many Inland Empire homes built in the 1970s–1990s have copper supply lines under slab that are reaching end of life — we find leaks precisely and repair them with minimal disruption.

High-pressure water jetting scours pipe walls completely clean — removing mineral scale, grease, and root intrusions that snaking cannot fully address. For Inland Empire pipes that have years of hard water buildup, hydrojetting restores full diameter and provides significantly longer-lasting results.

Gas leaks are a serious safety hazard requiring immediate licensed response. Our technicians use precision detection equipment to locate leaks in gas supply lines, appliance connections, and meter areas — then repair them to code with proper pressure testing to confirm the fix.

Inland Empire water is among the hardest in California. Whole-home water softeners and reverse osmosis systems protect pipes, extend appliance life, and dramatically improve the taste and quality of your water. We size, install, and maintain filtration systems for all home sizes.

settings.description_text: CA License #1097482. Every technician is licensed and backed by full liability insurance.
We quote before we work — always. No hidden fees, no surprise charges on any job.
Plumbing emergencies get immediate dispatch — 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, including holidays.
